resources.name: learning-database REST APIs
resources.description: REST endpoints for database-core (8080) and database-graph (8081), grouped by Spring Data feature.

resources.name: Graph - Social
resources.description: Homogeneous graph: person + knows

resources.name: Graph - Shop
resources.description: Heterogeneous graph: customer / order / product / employee

resources.name: Derived Queries
resources.description: Method-naming convention queries — Spring Data generates the query from the method signature

resources.name: JPQL & Native SQL
resources.description: Hand-written @Query (JPQL / nativeQuery) and @EntityGraph-backed queries

resources.name: By department with department (JPQL JOIN FETCH)
Projections
resources.description: Interface / DTO (constructor-expression) / Tuple projections

resources.name: Pagination & Sorting
resources.description: Page<T> — runs data + COUNT queries; Sort applied via PageRequest

resources.name: Slicing
resources.description: Slice<T> — no COUNT query, only knows if a next page exists

resources.name: Keyset & Offset Scrolling
resources.description: Window<T> / ScrollPosition — cursor-based pagination, O(1) per page vs OFFSET's O(N)

resources.name: Query By Example
resources.description: QueryByExampleExecutor — predicates built from a partially-populated probe entity

resources.name: Specification
resources.description: JpaSpecificationExecutor — predicates composed at runtime via the Criteria API

resources.name: Relationships
resources.description: @OneToOne / @OneToMany / @ManyToMany / @EmbeddedId mappings

resources.name: Inheritance Mapping
resources.description: SINGLE_TABLE / JOINED / TABLE_PER_CLASS / MappedSuperclass

resources.name: Soft Delete
resources.description: @SQLDelete+@SQLRestriction, Hibernate @SoftDelete, and @Filter — three different styles

resources.name: Auditing
resources.description: @CreatedDate / @CreatedBy / @LastModifiedDate / @Version populated automatically

resources.name: Get product by id (view audit fields)
Locking
resources.description: PESSIMISTIC_WRITE / PESSIMISTIC_READ / OPTIMISTIC (@Version)

resources.name: Read with shared lock (PESSIMISTIC_READ — SELECT FOR SHARE)
Bulk Updates (@Modifying)
resources.description: Non-SELECT @Query (UPDATE/DELETE) executed directly against the DB, bypassing the persistence context

resources.name: Transactions
resources.description: @Transactional propagation / isolation / rollback rules / timeout / readOnly

resources.name: Stored Procedures & Window Functions
resources.description: @Procedure / StoredProcedureQuery, and native SQL window functions

resources.name: JDBC Template & Batch Ops
resources.description: RowMapper / ResultSetExtractor / RowCallbackHandler / NamedParameterJdbcTemplate / batchUpdate / upsert

resources.name: Type Conversion (@Convert)
resources.description: AttributeConverter — Priority enum stored/read as VARCHAR
